case_title: DYMITS, LEE VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-06-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-20-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF FILED "LETTER AND REPLY BRIEF" TO BE PLACED ON THE FOLDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-20-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOE 1, LIBRARIAN OF MAIN PUBLIC LIBRARY DEO 2, LIBRARY'S PATRON DOE 3, LIBRARY'S SECURITY GUARD, SFIIPD BADGE #15 DOE 4, LIBRARY'S SECURITY GUARD SFIPD BADGE #14 DOE 5, SUPERIOR OF DOES 3 & 4 SFIPD BADGE #13 SEE ATTACHED ORDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: CASE TO BE HEARD BY THE PJ. IN DEPT.#206 ON 6-10-99 @1:30PM.
6-10-99, DEPT.#206, JUDGE: ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI, CLERK: DAN MACDUFF, CSR: MARIA TORREANO.
MATTER TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPT. FOR PRE-TRIAL DETERMINATIONS REGARDING THE STATUS OF THIS ACTION. PLTF HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY FOUND TO
BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. PLTF APPEARS IN PRO PER. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO APPEARS BY LEGAL ASSISTANT,TED DEMPSEY
THE COURT HEARS ORAL ARGUMENT & CONSULTS CASES CITED BY PLTF. EVIDENCE IS ADMITTED. THE COURT ORDER THIS CASE IS DISMISSED ON THE
GROUND THAT PLTF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT & HIS CASE IS W/O SUFFICIENT MERIT TO PROCEED. IT WAS CLERICAL ERROR FOR THE CLERK TO HAVE FILED THIS
CASE. FURTHER, THE COURT FINDS THAT THIS CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER,ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRE-FILNG ORDER (PLAINTIFF'S STATUS AS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT) RCVD.F/SUPERIOR COURT &FILED
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DYMITS, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOE 1, LIBRARIAN OF MAIN PUBLIC LIBRARY DEO 2, LIBRARY'S PATRON DOE 3, LIBRARY'S SECURITY GUARD, SFIIPD BADGE #15 DOE 4, LIBRARY'S SECURITY GUARD SFIPD BADGE #14 DOE 5, SUPERIOR OF DOES 3 & 4 SFIPD BADGE #13 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOE 1, LIBRARIAN OF MAIN PUBLIC LIBRARY
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO DYMITS LEE RETURNED TO SENDER;
CORR FROM DEFT TO PLAINTIFF FILED.
PLTFF FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 6/10 130PM,PA ID $10 CHECK(CAL:20-13),NOTIFIED DEFT.BY PERSONAL SERVICE,FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.
